title: Get "Can't find column" error using execute statement
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```sql
CREATE TABLE t1 (col1 int, col2 int);

prepare p3 from "select avg(col1) from t1 where not( col1 < ? ) or ( col2 = ? ) group by col1 having col1 = 7";

set @i0 = 1, @i1 = 1;

execute p3 using @i0, @i1;
```

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

Success.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```sql
mysql> execute p3 using @i0, @i1;execute p3 using @i0, @i1;
ERROR 1105 (HY000): Can't find column test.t1.col2 in schema Column: [test.t1.col1] PKOrUK: [] NullableUK: []
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

master

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (id int PRIMARY KEY, name varchar(50), age int, salary decimal(10,2));
INSERT INTO t2 (id, name, age, salary) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30, 50000.00);
INSERT INTO t2 (id, name, age, salary) VALUES (2, 'Bob', NULL, 60000.00);
PREPARE p4 FROM 'SELECT AVG(salary) FROM t2 WHERE age > ? OR (name = ?) GROUP BY id HAVING id = 1';
key_bug_features: Executing prepared statement with missing column reference
